Index.meta_title: Get Your Dream Product, Not What's Offered - Your Dream Design with Birebiro
Index.meta_description: AI-powered custom design products platform. Design with your imagination, we produce for you. Personalized paintings, wall decorations, and more.

Hero.title: Not What's Offered <gradient>Get Your Dream Product</gradient>
Hero.description: With AI support in seconds, design unique, high-quality real products in any language that will make your dreams and living spaces one of a kind. Let Birebiro bring your emotions to your spaces.

HowItWorks.section_subtitle: Get your dream product in 3 simple steps
HowItWorks.step1_description: We value your ideas and combine them with the highest quality products. Entry of low-quality products to this platform is strictly prohibited.
HowItWorks.step2_description: Describe your dream design to our AI technology with words. Birebiro, inspired by your unique feelings of the moment, will prepare a one-of-a-kind piece just for you.
HowItWorks.step3_description: Do you like your one-of-a-kind product on earth? Place a secure order with one click and let us carefully deliver it to your door.

Features.section_description: Powerful features that turn your imagination into reality
Features.feature1_description: Turkish, English, or French — it doesn't matter, Birebiro supports every language.
Features.feature2_description: From text to design, providing fast and instant solutions.
Features.feature3_description: Creates designs unique to you and the moment. An exact copy cannot be made at a different time.
Features.feature4_description: You can transfer the colors and textures of your space to your design for a perfect match by taking a photo.
Features.feature5_description: All products are carefully selected to add value to your dreams. We guarantee you the most modern, quality, unique, durable, and timeless decoration products with Birebiro.
Features.feature6_description: All information is kept as a secret end-to-end. Flawless security, sturdy packaging, and quality control processes are meticulously ensured for all tools and products.

Pricing.section_title: Choose the Plan That Suits You
Pricing.section_description: Choose the most suitable plan to turn your imagination into reality. We offer special benefits for every plan.
Pricing.free_plan_description: Get interior design and creative inspiration. Unlimited access, unlimited creativity.
Pricing.gift_plan_description: Special gift for new members! Create your first design and discover your imagination.
Pricing.enterprise_plan_description: Special solutions and support for interior design firms and enterprise customers.
Pricing.main_title: <gradient>Everyone</gradient> has the right to design at birebiro
Pricing.main_description:
No matter your budget, turn your dream painting into reality.
Art should be accessible to everyone.
Pricing.feature1_desc: Your photos turn into art with the most advanced AI technology. In seconds, professional quality.
Pricing.feature2_desc: Oil painting, watercolor, charcoal, pop art and more. Choose your dream style, leave the rest to us.
Pricing.feature3_desc: Free and safe delivery everywhere. Your painting comes to your door with special packaging.
Pricing.guarantee_text: ✓ Satisfaction guarantee   ✓ Secure payment   ✓ 14 days return
Pricing.quote: "Art should touch not only walls but also hearts. <highlight>Birebiro makes this possible for everyone.</highlight>"

PricingPlan.free_plan_description: For those who want to explore

FAQ.section_description: Answers to everything you are curious about are here
FAQ.question: How does Birebiro work?
FAQ.answer: Simply purchase and use a design credit, then describe your dream. With AI support, it provides an end-to-end quality and secure service where you can turn your dream into real, unique products in seconds.
FAQ.answer-2: It serves in the architectural decoration products, (e-commerce, e-export) artistic design products sectors.
FAQ.question-3: Does it work with every language model?
FAQ.answer-3: Birebiro, which uses the unifying power of art and design, supports every language model to achieve equal quality results. It has adopted the unifying power of art.
FAQ.question-4: How long is the delivery time?
FAQ.answer-4: Your custom-designed product, with no duplicate anywhere on earth, is carefully prepared in as little as 7 business days. Shipping time varies by country and city. On average, your unique product reaches your door within 8-10 days.
FAQ.question-5: Is there a product return process?
FAQ.answer-5: Yes, product returns are unconditional in case of defects during the delivery process or damage during the product preparation stage. However, custom-made products that arrive at your door undamaged and meeting the specified quality standards are not eligible for return; the return process becomes active when a product defect is proven.
FAQ.question-6: How does your pricing policy work?
FAQ.answer-6: In our pricing, without compromising the highest quality standards of the product, we combine your ideas and dreams with the highest quality products, use special packaging materials, and work with quality shipping companies.
